home.heroDescription: Build a beautiful restaurant website in minutes. Accept payments in USDC, EURC or PYUSD via Solana escrow. Let customers split bills with friends. No middlemen, no 30% fees.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: From setup to first order in under 10 minutes
home.step1Desc: Sign in with your Solana wallet (Phantom, Solflare). No email, no password — your wallet is your identity.
home.step2Desc: Choose a template, upload food photos, set your menu with prices in USDC, EURC or PYUSD. Publish when ready.
home.step3Desc: Customers order and pay via Solana escrow. Funds release on delivery confirmation. Split payments built in.
home.feature1Desc: Compare that to 15-30% from traditional platforms. Keep what you earn.
home.feature2Desc: Customer funds are held in on-chain escrow. Released on delivery confirmation.
home.feature3Desc: Customers can share an order link. Up to 10 friends can chip in via contribute_to_order.
home.feature4Desc: No waiting 2 weeks for payouts. Funds settle to your wallet on confirmation.
home.forCustomersDesc: Browse local restaurants, order food, and pay with crypto. Split the bill with friends in one tap.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to fork the food industry?
home.ctaDesc: Join the decentralized food delivery revolution. Connect your wallet and build your restaurant page today.

dashboard.connectWalletDesc: Connect your Solana wallet to create and manage your restaurant page.
dashboard.signToAuthDesc: Sign a message with your wallet to prove ownership and access your dashboard.
dashboard.createRestaurantDesc: Set up your restaurant page in just a few steps
dashboard.menuEditorDesc: Add items, set prices, upload photos
dashboard.payoutWalletHint: Solana address where you receive payments. Changes are recorded on-chain for auditing.
dashboard.autoAcknowledgeHint: Automatically start preparing orders as soon as they are funded.
dashboard.selfDeliveryHint: Your team handles all deliveries. ForkMe drivers won't receive bid requests.
dashboard.deliveryFeeOwnHint: Amount charged to the customer for your delivery service

orders.title: Orders
orders.subtitle: Manage incoming orders from customers
orders.noOrdersDesc: Orders will appear here when customers place them.
orders.confirmOrderDriverHint: Start preparing — delivery drivers on ForkMe will be notified
orders.confirmOrderSelfHint: Start preparing — your team handles delivery
orders.noBidsYet: No bids yet — drivers will appear here once they bid.
orders.confirmWithCodeDesc: Ask the customer for their code to close this order

delivery.title: Available Deliveries
delivery.subtitle: Browse open delivery requests and bid to claim them
delivery.noOrdersDesc: Check back soon — new delivery requests will appear here.

cart.emptyCartDesc: Browse restaurants and add some delicious items!
cart.connectWalletToPay: Connect your wallet to pay with Solana
cart.splitHint: After checkout, you can share a link for friends to split the bill
cart.fulfillmentMode: How would you like to receive your order?
cart.pickupHint: You'll collect your order at the restaurant — no delivery fee

order.contributeDesc: Split the bill! Anyone with this link can contribute.
order.shareDesc: Send this link to friends so they can chip in on the order.
